headline: Dominion Energy (D) Price Target Cut by $1 at Morgan Stanley
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) is included among the 10 Best Nuclear Energy Stocks to Buy for Dividends. Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) provides regulated electricity service to 3.6 million homes and businesses in Virginia, North Carolina, and South Carolina, and regulated natural gas service to 500,000 customers in South Carolina.
